name: Dallas County, Texas (United States)

colors.symbolism: the central white emblem within the disc

description: A blue field bearing a red disc at the centre, charged with a white stylised emblem representing Dallas County.
history: Flag of Dallas County, the second-most-populous county in Texas and a sub-state subdivision encompassing the city of Dallas and surrounding municipalities.

features.symbolism: Frames the central white emblem of Dallas County.

features.role: stylised white emblem within the central disc
features.symbolism: A stylised device within the red disc representing Dallas County and the Lone Star State.
